google.title: ImageForge CLI | Build-Time Image Optimization, Zero Monthly Cost

twitter.description: Optimize once, deploy everywhere, and keep recurring image optimization costs at zero.

h1: Optimize once, deploy everywhere, pay nothing monthly.

all.text: Optimize once, deploy everywhere, pay nothing monthly.
Responsive widths are target-based and bounded
First run scales with catalog size
Build once. Ship fast. Keep costs at zero.

jsonLd.raw: {"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"WebSite","name":"ImageForge CLI","description":"Build-time image optimization for Next.js and modern web apps with WebP/AVIF conversion, blurDataURL placeholders, deterministic hash caching, and CI enforcement.","url":"https://imageforge.dev","inLanguage":"en-US"}
